searchIndex.title: Local Anesthetic Systemic Toxicity (LAST): ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Local Anesthetic Systemic Toxicity (LAST): ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Symptoms include tongue numbness, seizures, cardiovascular collapse. / Treatment is IV 20% lipid emulsion. Tintinalli Ch 3

searchIndex.title: Local Anesthetic Systemic Toxicity (LAST): ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Local Anesthetic Systemic Toxicity (LAST): ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Avoid vasopressin and high-dose epinephrine in LAST arrest. Tintinalli Ch 3

searchIndex.title: Local Anesthetic Systemic Toxicity (LAST): ما الرقم المهم؟
searchIndex.text: Local Anesthetic Systemic Toxicity (LAST): ما الرقم المهم؟ Treatment is IV 20% lipid emulsion. Tintinalli Ch 3

searchIndex.title: Ketamine in Procedural Sedation: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Ketamine in Procedural Sedation: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Ketamine preserves respiratory drive and blood pressure. / Laryngospasm is rare but serious, especially in children. Tintinalli Ch 3

searchIndex.title: Ketamine in Procedural Sedation: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Ketamine in Procedural Sedation: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Match dosing to analgesia vs dissociation goal. Tintinalli Ch 3

searchIndex.title: Methods of Wound Closure: Staples: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Methods of Wound Closure: Staples: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Staples are fast for long linear lacerations. / Staples provide least precise closure. Tintinalli Ch 4

searchIndex.title: Methods of Wound Closure: Staples: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Methods of Wound Closure: Staples: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Avoid staples where cosmetic precision matters, such as face. Tintinalli Ch 4

searchIndex.title: Eyelid Lacerations: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Eyelid Lacerations: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Lid margin, lacrimal duct, orbital fat, ptosis are danger findings. Tintinalli Ch 4

searchIndex.title: Eyelid Lacerations: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Eyelid Lacerations: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Visible orbital fat or medial canthus injury requires specialist repair. Tintinalli Ch 4

searchIndex.title: Cocaine-Induced Myocardial Ischemia: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Cocaine-Induced Myocardial Ischemia: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Initial treatment includes aspirin, nitroglycerin, benzodiazepines. Tintinalli Ch 5

searchIndex.title: Cocaine-Induced Myocardial Ischemia: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Cocaine-Induced Myocardial Ischemia: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Avoid beta-blockers in cocaine chest pain board-style convention. Tintinalli Ch 5

searchIndex.title: Cardiac Tamponade: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Cardiac Tamponade: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Beck triad plus POCUS findings: effusion, RV collapse, plethoric IVC. Tintinalli Ch 5

searchIndex.title: Cardiac Tamponade: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Cardiac Tamponade: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Pericardiocentesis is for unstable tamponade, not stable effusion. Tintinalli Ch 5

searchIndex.title: Spontaneous Pneumothorax: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Spontaneous Pneumothorax: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Sinus tachycardia can be the most common physical finding. / Small stable primary PTX may be observed. Tintinalli Ch 6

searchIndex.title: Spontaneous Pneumothorax: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Spontaneous Pneumothorax: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Observation applies to selected primary PTX, not secondary PTX. Tintinalli Ch 6

searchIndex.title: Upper GI Bleed Management: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Upper GI Bleed Management: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Peptic ulcer disease is common cause; lactate elevation predicts worse outcomes. Tintinalli Ch 7

searchIndex.title: Upper GI Bleed Management: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
searchIndex.text: Upper GI Bleed Management: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟ Do not delay PPI while awaiting endoscopy in ulcer-related UGIB. Tintinalli Ch 7

searchIndex.title: Gastrointestinal Foreign Bodies: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟
searchIndex.text: Gastrointestinal Foreign Bodies: ما أهم فكرة امتحانية؟ Esophageal button batteries are emergencies; coin orientation differs in esophagus vs trachea. Tintinalli Ch 7

searchIndex.title: Gastrointestinal Foreign Bodies: ما الفخ الامتحاني؟
